name: AlertDialog
description: Modal confirmation dialog that interrupts the user for destructive actions.

api.name: AlertDialog
api.description: Modal confirmation dialog that interrupts the user for destructive actions.

parameters.name: DefaultOpen
parameters.description: Uncontrolled initial open state (Radix defaultOpen). Used only when the consumer does NOT bind Open: the dialog then owns its open state internally, seeded from this value. Ignored when Open is supplied (controlled mode).

parameters.name: OnBeforeClose
parameters.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape key, the Cancel button, or the Action button). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "cancel", "action").

events.name: OnBeforeClose
events.description: Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape key, the Cancel button, or the Action button). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "cancel", "action").

records.name: AlertDialogContext
records.signature: AlertDialogContext(bool IsOpen, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, string TitleId, string DescriptionId, Func<string, Task<bool>> TryDismiss)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<AlertDialog @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <AlertDialogTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Delete Account</Button>
    </AlertDialogTrigger>
    <AlertDialogContent>
        <AlertDialogHeader>
            <AlertDialogTitle>Are you absolutely sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
            <AlertDialogDescription>
                This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account
                and remove your data from our servers.
            </AlertDialogDescription>
        </AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogFooter>
            <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
            <AlertDialogAction>Continue</AlertDialogAction>
        </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
</AlertDialog>

@code {
    private bool _isOpen;
}

examples.title: With Action Handler
examples.code:
<AlertDialog @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <AlertDialogTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive">Remove Item</Button>
    </AlertDialogTrigger>
    <AlertDialogContent>
        <AlertDialogHeader>
            <AlertDialogTitle>Remove this item?</AlertDialogTitle>
            <AlertDialogDescription>
                This item will be permanently removed from your collection.
            </AlertDialogDescription>
        </AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogFooter>
            <AlertDialogCancel>Keep It</AlertDialogCancel>
            <AlertDialogAction OnAction="HandleRemove">Yes, Remove</AlertDialogAction>
        </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
</AlertDialog>

@code {
    private bool _isOpen;
    private void HandleRemove() { /* handle removal */ }
}

examples.title: Unsaved Changes
examples.code:
<AlertDialog @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <AlertDialogTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost">
            <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.X" class="h-4 w-4" /> Close Editor
        </Button>
    </AlertDialogTrigger>
    <AlertDialogContent>
        <AlertDialogHeader>
            <AlertDialogTitle>Discard unsaved changes?</AlertDialogTitle>
            <AlertDialogDescription>
                You have unsaved changes. If you close now, your changes will be lost.
            </AlertDialogDescription>
        </AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogFooter>
            <AlertDialogCancel>Keep Editing</AlertDialogCancel>
            <AlertDialogAction>Discard Changes</AlertDialogAction>
        </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
</AlertDialog>

examples.title: Loading Action
examples.code:
<AlertDialog @bind-Open="_loadingDialogOpen">
    <AlertDialogTrigger>
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive">Delete Account</Button>
    </AlertDialogTrigger>
    <AlertDialogContent>
        <AlertDialogHeader>
            <AlertDialogTitle>Are you absolutely sure?</AlertDialogTitle>
            <AlertDialogDescription>This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account.</AlertDialogDescription>
        </AlertDialogHeader>
        <AlertDialogFooter>
            <AlertDialogCancel>Cancel</AlertDialogCancel>
            <AlertDialogAction IsLoading="@_isDeleting" OnAction="HandleDelete">
                @(_isDeleting ? "Deleting..." : "Delete")
            </AlertDialogAction>
        </AlertDialogFooter>
    </AlertDialogContent>
</AlertDialog>

@code {
    private bool _loadingDialogOpen;
    private bool _isDeleting;

    private async Task HandleDelete()
    {
        _isDeleting = true;
        await Task.Delay(2000);
        _isDeleting = false;
        _loadingDialogOpen = false;
    }
}

parameters.name: ZIndex
parameters.description: Backdrop z-index. Content sits at ZIndex + 1. Defaults to BaseZIndex; OverlayProvider supplies an incrementing value per nested overlay.

parameters.name: ChildContentSlot
parameters.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

parameters.name: AsChild
parameters.description: When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot a cooperating child (a Lumeo <Button>, or a manual ChildContentSlot) folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal: one DOM node, no nested-interactive markup. Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper.

slots.name: ChildContentSlot
slots.description: Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

mdSummary:
# AlertDialog

Modal confirmation dialog that interrupts the user for destructive actions.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Overlay
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/alert-dialog

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AlertDialog | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialog | Open | `bool` | `` |  |
| AlertDialog | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| AlertDialog | DefaultOpen | `bool` | `` | Uncontrolled initial open state (Radix defaultOpen). Used only when the consumer does NOT bind Open: the dialog then owns its open state internally, seeded from this value. Ignored when Open is supplied (controlled mode). |
| AlertDialog | OnBeforeClose | `EventCallback<DismissEventArgs>` | `` | Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape key, the Cancel button, or the Action button). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "cancel", "action"). |
| AlertDialog | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| AlertDialog | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogAction | Context | `AlertDialog.AlertDialogContext` | `default!` |  |
| AlertDialogAction | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogAction | OnAction | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogAction | IsLoading | `bool` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogAction | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogAction | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogCancel | Context | `AlertDialog.AlertDialogContext` | `default!` |  |
| AlertDialogCancel | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogCancel | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogCancel | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogContent | Context | `AlertDialog.AlertDialogContext` | `default!` |  |
| AlertDialogContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogContent | ZIndex | `int` | `OverlayService.BaseZIndex` | Backdrop z-index. Content sits at ZIndex + 1. Defaults to BaseZIndex; OverlayProvider supplies an incrementing value per nested overlay. |
| AlertDialogContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogDescription | Context | `AlertDialog.AlertDialogContext` | `default!` |  |
| AlertDialogDescription | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogDescription | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogDescription | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogFooter | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogFooter | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogFooter | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogHeader | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogHeader | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogHeader | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogTitle | Context | `AlertDialog.AlertDialogContext` | `default!` |  |
| AlertDialogTitle | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogTitle | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogTitle | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogTrigger | Context | `AlertDialog.AlertDialogContext` | `default!` |  |
| AlertDialogTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogTrigger | ChildContentSlot | `RenderFragment<TriggerSlot>?` | `` | Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild. |
| AlertDialogTrigger | AsChild | `bool` | `` | When true, renders NO wrapper and cascades a TriggerSlot a cooperating child (a Lumeo <Button>, or a manual ChildContentSlot) folds onto its own single root element — the Radix asChild goal: one DOM node, no nested-interactive markup. Default false keeps the current role=button wrapper. |
| AlertDialogTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AlertDialogTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (AlertDialog) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AlertDialogAction) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AlertDialogCancel) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AlertDialogContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AlertDialogDescription) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AlertDialogFooter) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AlertDialogHeader) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AlertDialogTitle) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AlertDialogTrigger) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContentSlot` (AlertDialogTrigger) — Tier-2 escape hatch for AsChild with arbitrary markup — receives the TriggerSlot to splat manually. Lumeo <Button> children need only AsChild.

## Events
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `OnBeforeClose` (`EventCallback<DismissEventArgs>`) — Fires before any user-initiated dismiss (Escape key, the Cancel button, or the Action button). Set Cancel to true to abort. The Reason tells you which path fired ("escape", "cancel", "action").
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)

## Sub-components
- `AlertDialogAction`, `AlertDialogCancel`, `AlertDialogContent`, `AlertDialogDescription`, `AlertDialogFooter`, `AlertDialogHeader`, `AlertDialogTitle`, `AlertDialogTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`AlertDialog.AlertDialogContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in AlertDialogContent.razor

## Example
```razor
<AlertDialog />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-destructive-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`
